title: Graph degradation semantics hardening
goal: Audit and harden graph-related outputs so stale, missing, invalid, degraded or unavailable graph evidence is reported consistently and cannot be read as reachability, causality, impact completeness or default-promotion readiness.

acceptance.assertion: Graph consumers use a consistent degradation vocabulary across docs, CLI, availability and retrieval-adjacent outputs.
Outputs explicitly avoid causality, runtime reachability, completeness and impact claims.
Affected output paths have tests or a precise coverage gap is recorded.

metadata.outcome: Implemented in Lenskit PR #924 plus follow-up PR #925: graph load, availability, query explain, context compiler and delta-context graph gaps now share diagnostic degradation semantics. Only ok/available graph evidence is retrieval-eligible; stale, missing, invalid, validation-unavailable, degraded or profile-excluded graph evidence remains non-promotional and does not establish runtime reachability, causality, change impact, completeness or default-promotion readiness.
validation: Lenskit PR #924 GitHub CI passed and merged graph degradation semantics v1.
Lenskit PR #925 GitHub CI passed and fixed Codex feedback: validation_unavailable is degraded/warn, not invalid/error.

Post-merge on origin/main 43d97b2b7cd26d7cc1d5ce2cc53df8a4f2eb8912: 83 graph/retrieval/context tests passed, targeted ruff passed, planning-registration no new drift, doc-freshness PASS, docs/tasks/index.json parsed, and diff-check passed.

verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t010-shared-vocabulary: graph_degradation.py provides shared diagnostic semantics for graph load and graph availability states.
verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t010-consumers: repobrief_availability, query_core, context compiler and delta-context compiler use the shared semantics.
verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t010-non-promotional: non-ok and non-available graph states set graph_must_not_influence_retrieval and carry non-claims for reachability, causality, change impact, completeness and promotion readiness.
verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t010-validation-unavailable: validation_unavailable is classified degraded/warn rather than invalid/error.
